title: — Synopsis
text:
Upgrade your cluster smoothly to a newer version with this command
kubeadm upgrade [flags]

-h, --help
help for upgrade
help for upgrade

--rootfs string
The path to the 'real' host root filesystem. This will cause kubeadm to chroot into the provided path.
The path to the 'real' host root filesystem. This will cause kubeadm to chroot into the provided path.
